document.text:
### *********************************************************************
###
### Use this file to issue REST requests to the service
### using VS Code RFEST Client extension:
### https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=humao.rest-client
###
### *********************************************************************


### *****************************
### Obtain login for user admin

# @name login
POST https://host.docker.internal:30081/auth/realms/master/protocol/openid-connect/token
Content-Type:  application/x-www-form-urlencoded

grant_type=password
&client_id=fabric-ui-root
&username=admin
&password=Gr33nD0t!

### *****************************
### GetSnapshot

GET https://host.docker.internal:30081/compliance-snapshots/v1/o/6164b/portfolios/33d0f153-250c-ee11-9155-005056a60c25/models/2/snapshots/4
content-type: application/json
Authorization: Bearer {{login.response.body.access_token}}

### *****************************
### ListSnapshots
GET https://host.docker.internal:30081/compliance-snapshots/v1/o/45043/portfolios/32D0F153-250C-EE11-9155-005056A60C25/models/2/snapshots
content-type: application/json
Authorization: Bearer {{login.response.body.access_token}}

### *****************************
### CreateSnapshot
POST https://host.docker.internal:30081/compliance-snapshots/v1/o/45043/portfolios/32D0F153-250C-EE11-9155-005056A60C25/models/2/snapshots?operation_confirmed=1
content-type: application/json
Authorization: Bearer {{login.response.body.access_token}}

    "process_pik_assets": true,

    "process_commitment_reductions": true,

}

### UpdateSnapshot
PATCH https://host.docker.internal:8081/v1/o/88fc8/portfolios/32D0F153-250C-EE11-9155-005056A60C25/models/2/snapshots/1?operation_confirmed=1
content-type: application/json
Authorization: Bearer {{login.response.body.access_token}}

  "as_of_date": "2023-10-19T00:00:00Z",

            "comparison_operator": "<%Comparison Operator,\r\nCOMPARISON_OPERATOR,\r\n,\r\nFALSE,\r\nV%>",
            "comparison_value": "<%Number of Subcategories,\r\n,\r\nNUMERIC,\r\nFALSE,\r\nV%>",
            "ddx": "",
            "friendly_description": "dbo.RatingRank(<%Fitch Rating Field 2,\r\n  FITCH_RATING,\r\n,\r\n  FALSE,\r\n  F%>, ​FR​) - dbo.RatingRank(<%Fitch Rating Field 1,\r\n  FITCH_RATING,\r\n,\r\n  FALSE,\r\n  F%>, ​FR​) <%Comparison Operator,\r\nCOMPARISON_OPERATOR,\r\n,\r\nFALSE,\r\nV%> <%Number of Subcategories,\r\n,\r\nNUMERIC,\r\nFALSE,\r\nV%>"
        }
    ],

    "friendly_description": "dbo.RatingRank (<%Fitch Rating Field 2,\r\n  FITCH_RATING,\r\n,\r\n  FALSE,\r\n  F%>,\r\n  'FR')-dbo.RatingRank (<%Fitch Rating Field 1,\r\n  FITCH_RATING,\r\n,\r\n  FALSE,\r\n  F%>,\r\n  'FR')<%Comparison Operator,\r\nCOMPARISON_OPERATOR,\r\n,\r\nFALSE,\r\nV%><%Number of Subcategories,\r\n,\r\nNUMERIC,\r\nFALSE,\r\nV%>",
    "friendly_description_expanded": "dbo.RatingRank (<%Fitch Rating Field 2,\r\n  FITCH_RATING,\r\n,\r\n  FALSE,\r\n  F%>,\r\n  ​FR​)-dbo.RatingRank (<%Fitch Rating Field 1,\r\n  FITCH_RATING,\r\n,\r\n  FALSE,\r\n  F%>,\r\n  ​FR​)<%Comparison Operator,\r\nCOMPARISON_OPERATOR,\r\n,\r\nFALSE,\r\nV%><%Number of Subcategories,\r\n,\r\nNUMERIC,\r\nFALSE,\r\nV%>",
    "ddx_errors": [],
    "field_names": []
}
}

### *****************************
### UpdateActualInterest

content-type: ap

messages.body:
You're missing a comma after the `"etag": "AAAAAAA="` line. It should be:

```json
"etag": "AAAAAAA=",
"filter_expression": {
```

Without that comma, the JSON is malformed and the server can't parse it.
